name: Samuel Kelechi
tagline: I build fast, reliable systems — from Go microservices to pixel-perfect UIs.
bio: Hey, I'm Samkell — a software engineer with 5+ years of experience shipping production Go backends, designing scalable APIs, and crafting interfaces people actually enjoy using. I believe great software is equal parts systems thinking and deep attention to craft. When I'm not coding, I'm writing about it.
